name: music-library-manager
description: RB Editor Pro — Rekordbox library editor with native audio engine

scripts.cleanup: powershell -Command "try { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000,5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } catch {}; exit 0"
scripts.dev:full: npm run cleanup && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "python -m app.main"
